phase1_summary: ENR validation code in enr.rs implements parsing and validation for three critical ENR fields: eth2, cgc, nfd. Well-bounded domains with proper range validation for cgc. Fork digest validation occurs during discovery queries via eth2_fork_predicate.
phase1_anomalies: AI-01: cgc boundary condition - validated OK
AI-06: conditional cgc/nfd presence - intentional for Fulu fork
phase3_guard_identified: Three-layer validation: RLP decoding, SSZ decoding, range boundary check for cgc
notes: Property holds: All ENR fields validated before peer acceptance via Result types and predicate short-circuiting

phase1_summary: ENR publication logic in build_enr() correctly implements Fulu/PeerDAS spec. eth2 always added. cgc/nfd conditionally added when is_peer_das_scheduled(). cgc has cascading fallback defaults.
phase1_anomalies: Informational: cgc not validated at write-time but validated at read-time
phase3_guard_identified: is_peer_das_scheduled() guards cgc/nfd addition; custody_group_count() validates range on read
notes: Property holds: All three invariants proven. eth2 unconditional, cgc/nfd conditional on Fulu schedule

phase1_summary: Peer ENR evaluation implements secure parsing for eth2/fork_digest, nfd, and cgc. All fields use Result-based error handling. cgc validated against [custody_requirement, number_of_custody_groups].
phase3_guard_identified: cgc range validation (custody_requirement..=number_of_custody_groups).contains(&cgc); eth2_fork_predicate for fork matching
notes: All 5 invariants verified: cgc bounded, eth2 decoded safely, nfd typed, subnet_predicate rejects invalid, no panics on malformed data

phase1_summary: Blob serving logic uses XOR relationship: blobs_required XOR data_columns_required per epoch. Storage layer segregates blob vs data column storage by fork epoch.
phase3_guard_identified: is_peer_das_enabled_for_epoch(e) gates storage type; AvailableBlockData enum enforces type safety
notes: Property holds by design: post-Fulu epochs never store blobs (only data columns), so get_blobs() returns empty. Architectural invariant enforced at storage layer.

phase1_summary: Fork struct constructed at lines 58-62 with deterministic values: previous_version from Electra state, current_version from spec.fulu_fork_version, epoch from current_epoch.
phase3_guard_identified: Direct construction proof: Fork fields assigned unconditionally from correct sources
notes: Property verified by construction. fork.previous_version=Electra, fork.current_version=Fulu (0x06000000), fork.epoch=current_epoch. Same pattern as all previous fork upgrades.

phase1_summary: Vector rotation via copy_within shifts out first epoch slots, loop fills last epoch with new proposers. Length preserved by design: ProposerLookaheadSlots = (min_seed_lookahead + 1) * slots_per_epoch.
phase3_guard_identified: safe_arith prevents overflow, get_mut().ok_or() bounds check, Vector<u64,N> type constraint
notes: Invariant proven by induction: base case at initialize_proposer_lookahead, inductive step at each epoch rotation

phase1_summary: BlobSchedule maintains descending epoch ordering invariant. BlobParameters has {epoch, max_blobs_per_block}. Sorting via new() ensures consistency.
phase3_guard_identified: is_fulu_scheduled() gates blob_schedule; fallback chain max_blobs_per_block_electra always available
notes: Four invariants proven: descending order, correct epoch lookup, serialization roundtrip, complete fallbacks
